deepen.title: Enhance Self-Improving Agentic Operating Systems
deepen.rationale: Further develop and refine the existing self-improving agentic operating systems to increase their efficiency and capabilities
deepen.firstStep: Integrate idle detection and SMARC output-quality verification from sos into loop-engineering-anything

deepen.title: Improve Agent Frameworks and Tooling
deepen.rationale: Expand and enhance the agent frameworks and tooling to support a wider range of applications and use cases
deepen.firstStep: Develop a new module for openclaw-pro-public that incorporates the verification harness from cli-judge

widen.title: Explore Embodied/Physical AI
widen.rationale: Investigate the potential of embodied/physical AI and its applications in various fields
widen.firstStep: Research and develop a proof-of-concept for an embodied AI system using the physical-ai-platform repository

widen.title: Develop On-Device Local LLMs
widen.rationale: Create and improve on-device local LLMs to enable more efficient and private AI processing
widen.firstStep: Integrate the local LLM capabilities from money-os into the awesome-auto-ai-research repository

lengthen.title: Harden cli-judge into a versioned, benchmarked release
lengthen.rationale: Take the strongest verification repo further along its lifecycle — from working tool to a documented, benchmarked, semver-tagged product others can depend on (Three Horizons H1→H2).
lengthen.firstStep: Add a public benchmark suite + a v1.0 tag with a CHANGELOG and a one-command quickstart.

heighten.title: Extract the shared 'self-improving loop' into one reusable substrate
heighten.rationale: The same generate→judge→refactor loop recurs across sos, loop-engineering-anything, and flywheel. Abstract it into a single small core the others import — compress the mechanism (MDL / go-meta).
heighten.firstStep: Define the minimal loop interface and refactor one repo to consume it as a dependency.

collaborators.whyMatch: Shared interest in self-improving agents and AI workforce
collaborators.suggestedIntro: Hi Mervin, I've been exploring self-improving agents and came across your work on PrasionAI. I'd love to discuss potential collaborations and learn from your experience in deploying autonomous AI workforce.

collaborators.whyMatch: Interest in agent orchestration and self-improving agent teams
collaborators.suggestedIntro: Hi Undertone0809, I've been investigating agent orchestration and self-improving agent teams. Your work on Rudder caught my attention, and I'd like to explore potential synergies and learn from your expertise.

collaborators.whyMatch: Shared interest in on-device local LLMs and AI-native operating systems
collaborators.suggestedIntro: Hi YASSERRMD, I've been researching on-device local LLMs and AI-native operating systems. Your work on NuraOS is impressive, and I'd love to discuss potential collaborations and explore ways to integrate our research.

note: The collaborator candidates were selected based on their relevance to the widenInterests and verified strengths of the builder.
